case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. RYAN PARUNGAO ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF CUSTODIAN OF RECORDS IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR ENTRY JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CIVIL CODE 1788.60(A) (TRANSACTION ID # 200020122) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
